conditions: Deploy may proceed only after Go/No-Go decision record is generated and validated.
No API keys, .env values, credentials, or raw secrets may be written to docs, logs, evidence, or approval files.
Non-NVIDIA provider calls remain gated by credentialRef, credential vault, user-owned provider policy, selectable gate, quota, and budget controls.
Billing remains estimate-only unless a separate real billing approval is issued.
Release, deploy, tag creation, and artifact upload still require final explicit execution confirmation.
